title: AI Coding Subscription API-Equivalent Value
methodology: API-equivalent value = estimated cost of the same token usage if billed at public API list prices. SemiAnalysis figures come from exhausting each plan's weekly limits with long-horizon coding tasks (reported June 2026). Other rows are community reverse-engineers or official rate-based estimates. Values are ceilings at full utilization — most users burn far less.

sources.name: SemiAnalysis
sources.note: Purchased each Anthropic/OpenAI plan; ran coding tasks until weekly limits; valued tokens at API rates.

sources.name: SemiAnalysis summary (Vaibhav Sisinty)
sources.note: Widely circulated table of SemiAnalysis ceilings.

sources.name: xAI Grok FAQ
sources.note: Weekly shared pool; no official dollar size; Extra Usage at standard rates.

sources.name: r/hermesagent SuperGrok reverse-engineer
sources.note: Low-end SuperGrok weekly pool estimate from token %.

plans.notes: SemiAnalysis ceiling at full weekly utilization on coding tasks.
SemiAnalysis: up to ~$8,000/mo API-equivalent. Often cited as ~$7,800 revenue opportunity loss for Anthropic.
SemiAnalysis ceiling including coding load until weekly limits.
SemiAnalysis ceiling. Matches common 'Codex $100 plan' power-user tier framing.
SemiAnalysis ceiling. Highest measured subsidy in the study (~$13,800 opportunity cost at full use).

plans.includes: Grok Build CLI, shared weekly pool (Chat/Imagine/Voice/Build)
plans.notes: No official $ pool. Low end ~$10/mo reverse-engineered from Hermes %; mid ~$80–90 DIY Build estimates; high $700–2,000 is @grok-style framing, not a measured ceiling. Agentic Build often exhausts the week in hours, not all-day every day.

plans.includes: Highest Grok weekly pool · Grok Build · multi-agent modes
plans.notes: xAI does not publish pool $. Primary value is much larger weekly allowance than SuperGrok; public reverse-engineers range from hundreds to multi-thousand $/mo. Treat as directional only.

plans.includes: IDE agent, included usage + usage-based overage
plans.notes: Not in SemiAnalysis coding-drain study. Value depends on which frontier models you route; often hybrid seat + metered tokens — not a pure API-equivalent ceiling.
Not measured by SemiAnalysis. Bundle product with different economics than Claude Code / Codex.
